channel.title: Backups on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Backups on Arrans github.io

item.title: Dokploy/dokploy
item.description: Open Source Alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku.

item.title: ArchiveBox/ArchiveBox
item.description: 🗃 Open source self-hosted web archiving. Takes URLs/browser history/bookmarks/Pocket/Pinboard/etc., saves HTML, JS, PDFs, media, and more…

item.title: AkashRajpurohit/git-sync
item.description: 🔄 A simple tool to backup and sync your git repositories
